resources.string: Failed to add Channel, please retry
You are already using the latest version
Restoring from this backup overwrites current config.
Expand folder and select one path
KimiClaw was unable to install the bootstrap packages.

"KimiClaw cannot be installed on portable/external/removable sd card on your device. Bootstrap binaries compiled for KimiClaw have hardcoded $PREFIX path and cannot be installed under any path other than: %1$s."
"KimiClaw can only be run as the primary user. Bootstrap binaries compiled for KimiClaw have hardcoded $PREFIX path and cannot be installed under any path other than: %1$s."
Please check your network connection and try again
For exporting and restoring OpenClaw configurations
Connect charger for stable OpenClaw gateway
Failed to open battery optimization settings
Tap %1$d more times to enable developer mode

"About to perform deep repair, including fixing Node.js dependencies, npm packages, configuration and plugin status.
This may take a few minutes. Continue?"
Do not close the app during repair
Please try again later or contact support
%1$s requires `allow-external-apps` property to be set to `true` in `%2$s` file.
The %1$s (%2$s) app is not installed or is disabled.
Attempted to ask for permissions that have not been requested in app manifest: %1$s
Attempted to check for permissions that have not been requested in app manifest: %1$s

%1$s requires \"Display over other apps\" permission to start activities and services from background on Android >= 10. Grants it from Android Settings -> Apps -> %1$s -> Advanced -> Draw over other apps. The permission name may be different on different devices, like on Xiaomi, its called \"Display pop-up windows while running in the background\", check https://dontkillmyapp.com for device specific issues.
KimiClaw requires \"Display over other apps\" permission to start terminal sessions from background on Android >= 10. Grants it from Settings -> Apps -> KimiClaw -> Advanced
"Exception received while to executing \"%1$s\" app shell command. Exception: %2$s"
"Exception received while to executing \"%1$s\" termux session command. Exception: %2$s"
Executable not set \"%1$s\" for shell command
Execution has been cancelled since execution service is being killed
Failed to execute \"%1$s\" app shell command
Failed to execute \"%1$s\" termux session command
Failed to request permissions with request code %1$d: %2$s
Failed to get package context for the \"%1$s\" package. This may be because the app package is not installed or it has different APK signature from the current app.
The \"%1$s\" package is targeting targetSdkVersion %2$d and is running on android sdk %3$d but has not set requestLegacyExternalStorage to true in app manifest
An error occurred during the update:
Visit %1$s for more info on RUN_COMMAND Intent usage.
Invalid execution command runner to RunCommandService: `%1$s`
Sending SIGKILL to process on user request or because android is killing the execution service
The Termux:Styling Plugin App is not installed.
The Termux app (package context) is not accessible.

The Termux app $PREFIX directory is not accessible by the %1$s app. This may be because you have not installed or setup Termux app or Termux app and %1$s app both have different APK signatures because you have managed to install both apps from different sources. It may also be because Termux $PREFIX directory \"/data/data/com.moonshot.kimiclaw/files/usr\" does not exist or does not have read, write and execute permissions.
Shell name not set but `%1$s` shell create mode passed
Invalid execution command runner to TermuxService: `%1$s`
Failed to start TermuxService while app is in background due to android bg restrictions.
Failed to start TermuxService. Check logcat for exception message.
Unsupported execution command runner to TermuxService: `%1$s`
Unsupported execution command shell create mode to TermuxService: `%1$s`
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
Write down your feedback about our product
Complete Lark app creation in browser
After deletion, chatting through this Feishu bot stops
Feishu is not installed. Please install it first
Gateway will restart during the update
Start failed: Exit code: %1$d, Output: %2$s, Error: %3$s
Gateway start timeout. Command submitted but process not confirmed running
An error occurred during installation, please retry
"Installation takes 1 minute, don't exit app or lock screen"
Invalid backup file: metadata not found
The current version of Kimi does not support this feature. Please update to the latest version from the app store
This feature requires the Kimi App. Please download it from the app store
You have not authorized a Kimi account yet. Please go to Kimi App to complete authorization before using the chat feature
Bot ID not found, please log in first
This feature is not supported by the current version, please update Kimi to the latest version
Add termux debug info to report?
Close down existing ones before creating new.

"If you want to report this issue, then copy its text from the options menu (3-dots on top right) and post an issue on one of the following links.
If you are posting a Termux app crash report, then please provide details on what you were doing that caused the crash and how to reproduce it, if possible.
If you are posting an issue on GitHub, then post it in the repository at which the report belongs at. Issues opened or emails sent with **(partial) screenshots** instead of copied text or a file of this report **will likely be automatically closed/deleted**. You may optionally remove any device specific info that you consider private or don't want to share or that is not relevant to the issue.
We do not provide support for any hacking related tools/scripts. Any questions asked about them over email, on GitHub or other official termux community forums **will likely be automatically closed/deleted** and may even result in **temporary or permanent** ban. Check %1$s/wiki/Hacking for details."

"**Report Truncated**
Report is too large to view here. Use `Save To File` option from options menu (3-dots on top right) and view it in an external text editor app.
##
"
The storage permission granted by user on request
The storage permission not granted by user on request
The Termux is required by the %1$s app to run termux commands.
No logs found. Waiting for new log entries…
Kimi Claw accessibility service is running
Keep OpenClaw Gateway running in the background
Already using the latest OpenClaw version (%1$s)
A new version of OpenClaw is available. Update now?
OpenClaw has been successfully updated to
Enable accessibility service to support UI automation. Note: You need to re-enable accessibility service each time you launch the app.
If you see Not running or This service is malfunctioning, please disable and re-enable the Accessibility Service for Kimi Claw.
"1. Go to \"Accessibility\" settings 2. Find Kimi Claw 3. Tap \"Use Kimi Claw\", then tap \"Allow\" in the confirmation dialog"
"1. Go to \"Accessibility\" settings 2. Tap \"Installed services\" 3. Find Kimi Claw 4. Tap Kimi Claw, then tap \"Allow\" in the confirmation dialog"
"1. Go to \"Accessibility\" settings 2. Tap \"Downloaded apps\" 3. Find Kimi Claw 4. Tap \"Kimi Claw\", then tap \"Allow\" in the confirmation dialog"
"1. Go to \"Accessibility\" settings 2. Tap \"Installed apps\" 3. Find Kimi Claw 4. Tap \"On\", then tap \"Allow\" in the confirmation dialog"
"1. Go to \"Accessibility\" settings 2. Find Kimi Claw 3. Tap \"Kimi Claw\", then tap \"Allow\" in the confirmation dialog"
"1. Go to \"Accessibility\" settings 2. Tap \"Downloaded apps\" 3. Find Kimi Claw 4. Tap \"Use Kimi Claw\", then tap \"Allow\" in the confirmation dialog"
Enable accessibility service to support UI automation
Fully allow Kimi Claw to run in background to ensure OpenClaw Gateway service is not interrupted
"Go to \"Apps\" settings, find Kimi Claw 1. Tap \"App Battery Usage\" 2. Tap \"Allow Background Usage\" 3. Tap \"Unrestricted\""

"Go to \"Apps & Services\" settings, select \"App Management\", find Kimi Claw 1. Tap \"Battery Details\" 2. Tap \"Launch Management\" 3. Disable \"Manage Automatically\", enable \"Allow Auto-launch\", \"Allow Associated Launch\", \"Allow Background Activity\" If \"Battery Details\" is not tappable, try again after 30 minutes from Settings > \"Auto-launch Management\""
"Go to \"Apps\" settings, tap \"App Management\", find Kimi Claw 1. Tap \"Battery Management\" 2. Tap \"Allow Background Activity\""
"Go to \"Apps\" settings, find Kimi Claw 1. Tap \"Battery\" 2. Tap \"Unrestricted\""
"Go to \"Battery\" settings, tap \"Background Power Consumption Management\", find Kimi Claw 1. Tap \"Allow High Background Power Consumption\""
"On the App Info page, find Kimi Claw 1. Tap \"App Battery Usage\" 2. Enable \"Allow Background Usage\" 3. Select \"Unrestricted\""
"Go to \"App Settings\", find Kimi Claw 1. Tap \"Battery Saver\" 2. Tap \"No Restrictions\""
After enabling auto-start, Kimi Claw can automatically resume even if the system stops it due to memory management, preventing service interruption
"Go to \"Security Center\" or \"Phone Manager\" 1. Tap \"App Management\" 2. Tap \"Permissions\" → \"Auto-start Management\" 3. Find Kimi Claw, enable auto-start toggle"
Allow app to restart after being stopped by system
Network disconnected, please check network settings
Install OpenClaw and export backup settings
execute arbitrary commands within KimiClaw environment and access files
please grant it in app settings
Service not connected, please try again later
Backup contains API keys. Store securely.
Choose a method to configure API Key
Deploy OpenClaw to your phone, chat via chat apps, spare phone recommended
Quick deploy OpenClaw to phone, 7x24 remote control
Kimi Claw needs the following permissions to run OpenClaw Gateway stably
Need to authorize access to the Documents/KimiClaw directory to save and restore OpenClaw configurations. Please tap \"Use this folder\" on the next screen to complete.
After deletion, chatting through this Telegram bot stops
Disable flashes and notifications for plugin errors.
Show flashes and notifications for plugin errors. (Default)
Soft keyboard will be enabled even if hardware keyboard is connected. (Default)
Soft keyboard will be enabled only if no hardware keyboard is connected.
Soft Keyboard Only If No Hardware
Logs will not have entries for terminal view keys. (Default)
Logcat logs will have entries for terminal view keys. These are very verbose and should be disabled under normal circumstances or will cause performance issues.
Terminal margin adjustment will be disabled.

Terminal margin adjustment will be enabled. It should be enabled to try to fix the issue where soft keyboard covers part of extra keys/terminal view. If it causes screen flickering on your devices, then disable it. (Default)
Click URL to copy or long press to open
No URL found in the terminal.
Unable to get current OpenClaw version
Unable to get latest version info, please check network connection
You are using the latest stable version
Unable to connect to OpenClaw Gateway, please ensure Gateway is started
Connection timeout, please check network or Gateway status
Unable to resolve address, please check network connection
After deletion, chatting through this WeChat bot stops
QR code expired, please try again
Deploy OpenClaw to this phone, chat via Kimi, WeChat, feishu and other chat apps
Kimi Claw requires a stable network connection. Best used on a spare phone plugged in.
OpenClaw may have privacy risks, use with caution
